import struct

# Create a minimal valid PNG: 1x1 pixel, solid blue
# PNG signature + IHDR chunk \(1x1\) + IDAT \(blue pixel\) + IEND

def create_minimal_png\(filename\):
    # PNG signature
    png_sig = b'\\x89PNG\\r\\n\\x1a\\n'
    
    # IHDR chunk: 1x1, 8-bit RGB
    ihdr_data = struct.pack\('>IIBBBBB', 1, 1, 8, 2, 0, 0, 0\)
    ihdr_crc = 0x90773546  # Pre-calculated CRC for minimal 1x1 IHDR
    ihdr = b'IHDR' + ihdr_data
    ihdr_chunk = struct.pack\('>I', 13\) + ihdr + struct.pack\('>I', ihdr_crc\)
    
    # IDAT chunk: minimal compressed data for 1x1 blue pixel \(00 00 00 FF = blue RGB\)
    idat_data = b'\\x08\\x99c\\xf8\\x0f\\x00\\x00\\x01\\x00\\x01'
    idat_crc = 0x8e3c3c5b
    idat_chunk = struct.pack\('>I', len\(idat_data\)\) + b'IDAT' + idat_data + struct.pack\('>I', idat_crc\)
    
    # IEND chunk
    iend_crc = 0xae426082
    iend_chunk = struct.pack\('>I', 0\) + b'IEND' + struct.pack\('>I', iend_crc\)
    
    png_data = png_sig + ihdr_chunk + idat_chunk + iend_chunk
    
    with open\(filename, 'wb'\) as f:
        f.write\(png_data\)

create_minimal_png\('icon16.png'\)
create_minimal_png\('icon48.png'\)
create_minimal_png\('icon128.png'\)

print\("Created icon16.png, icon48.png, icon128.png"\)
EOF)
